of happiness, etc.
Mars & Hershel :
Paribhraman Mars making good aspects to natal & paribhraman Hershel gives authority &
sudden wealth.
Bad aspects : give violent anger, indignation, passion, strife, enmity, loss from authorities,
accidents, strange & odd difficulties, fear of government, etc. Many a times there have been
opposition from elderly or high government officials.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
56

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
Mars & Neptune :
Good aspects of paribhraman mars & Neptune gives benefic results with regards to the matters
pertaining to the houses of mars and also gets happiness from the person indicated by those
houses.
